arts.ttl: Wojciech Szczesny will sign for Barcelona despite doubts about role – Matteo Moretto
arts.sum: Barcelona are set to bring in former Arsenal and Juventus goalkeeper Wojciech Szczesny next week, but there have been doubts over his role once he arrives. Some reports say that he will only arrive on the condition that he starts, while others say Inaki Pena has been given assurances he will remain number one. arts.ttl: Barcelona injury news: Will key duo be available against Osasuna?
arts.sum: Barcelona boss Hansi Flick confirms that both Raphinha and Marc Casado will be available for Saturday's La Liga clash against Osasuna.

arts.ttl: Top Barcelona transfer target "does not regret" turning down Camp Nou move
arts.sum: Nico Williams "does not regret" rejecting the chance to join Barcelona over the summer, insists his brother and Athletic Bilbao teammate Inaki Williams.

arts.ttl: When is Osasuna - Barcelona? how to watch on TV, stream online
arts.sum: The game between Osasuna - Barcelona will be played on Saturday 28 October, with kick off at 3:00 p.m. ET / 12:00 p.m. PT . As La Liga action heats up, all eyes are on the upcoming clash between CA Osasuna and FC Barcelona at El Sadar Stadium in Pamplona .
